description: 5-email nurture sequence for cold leads from Ava's outbound calls. Targets Australian trade businesses that got a voicemail, had a conversation but didn't book, or expressed interest but wanted to think about it.

placeholders.unsubscribe_url: One-click unsubscribe URL generated by Resend

subject_lines.conversation_no_book: Good chatting earlier — one quick thing
subject_lines.interested_thinking: Following up on our chat about {{business_name}}

emails.description: Sent within 1 hour of first call/voicemail. Introduces Velocity AI and the core value prop — never miss a call again.
Day 2 — shares a specific result / case study with hard numbers. Makes the opportunity concrete.
Day 5 — addresses the #1 pain point tradies face: being stuck doing admin after hours instead of living their life.
Day 7 — two short testimonials from trade business owners. Builds trust through peer validation.
Day 14 — respectful final touch. Creates soft urgency with limited onboarding spots. No hard sell, leaves door open.

notes: Send window is 7am-7pm AEST — tradies check email early morning before heading to site.
Preferred send time is 7:30am to catch them with their morning coffee.
Email 1 subject line varies by call disposition — use the matching variant.
All other emails use a single default subject line.
If a lead books at any point, the sequence stops immediately and the discovery-call-confirmation.html template takes over.
After the sequence completes without a booking, the lead moves to the 'exhausted' nurture list with a 90-day cooldown before any re-engagement.
